title: LVL = BORDER
description: It is a Challenge that makes the world border bigger when the player gets Level.(Also works as ServerMod with Friends, etc.)
body:
This is a mod that makes Minecraft a litle bit more interesting.
The worldborder gets bigger when the player has more Levels.
And also when the Player loses xp it shrinks again.

This is a Serverside mod. That means you can play it in singleplayer but if you want to use it on a multiplayer server it has to be installed on the serverside!
